images.copyright: Black grouse males facing off on a lekking site, Estonia (© Sven Zacek/Nature Picture Library)
images.title: The lek side story
images.caption: Black grouse males, Estonia
images.desc: Before sunrise, the moorland clock punches in—and the dance floor opens. Male black grouse don't send invites; they boom them. Welcome to lekking season, where romance is competitive, noisy, and strictly outdoors.

tooltips.walle: This image is not available to download as wallpaper.
tooltips.walls: Download this image. Use of this image is restricted to wallpaper only.
